places.name: Tsim Sha Tsui Promenade
places.address: 油尖旺區 Yau Tsim Mong District, 香港 Hong Kong, 中国
places.note: Kowloon waterfront with sweeping views of Victoria Harbour and the nightly light show

places.name: Avenue of Stars
places.address: 梳士巴利道 Salisbury Road, 油尖旺區 Yau Tsim Mong District, 香港 Hong Kong, 中国
places.note: Harbourfront walkway honouring Hong Kong cinema legends

places.name: M+ Museum
places.address: 博物館道 Museum Drive, 油麻地 Yau Ma Tei, 香港 Hong Kong, 中国
places.note: World-class visual culture museum in West Kowloon, strong architecture and design collection

places.name: Hong Kong Palace Museum
places.address: 博物館道 Museum Drive, 油麻地 Yau Ma Tei, 香港 Hong Kong, 中国
places.note: West Kowloon museum displaying imperial artifacts on loan from Beijing's Forbidden City

places.name: Kowloon Walled City Park
places.address: 九龍城 Kowloon City, 香港 Hong Kong, 中国
places.note: Former lawless walled city demolished in 1994, now a peaceful Qing-dynasty-themed park

places.name: Nan Lian Garden
places.address: 斧山 Hammer Hill, 香港 Hong Kong, 中国
places.note: Classical Tang-dynasty style garden in Diamond Hill, immaculately maintained

places.name: Chi Lin Nunnery
places.address: 志蓮道 Chi Lin Drive, 斧山 Hammer Hill, 香港 Hong Kong, 中国
places.note: Large Buddhist nunnery adjacent to Nan Lian Garden, serene wooden architecture

places.name: Victoria Peak
places.address: 香港 Hong Kong, 中国
places.note: Hong Kong's highest point, accessible by the historic Peak Tram, iconic harbour panorama

places.name: Man Mo Temple
places.address: 荷李活道 Hollywood Road, 上環 Sheung Wan, 香港島 Hong Kong Island, 香港 Hong Kong
places.note: One of Hong Kong's oldest Taoist temples, permanently filled with giant incense coils

places.name: Tai Kwun
places.address: 荷李活道 Hollywood Road, 中環 Central, 香港島 Hong Kong Island, 香港 Hong Kong
places.note: Former Victorian-era police headquarters and prison turned contemporary arts and culture centre

places.name: Hong Kong Park
places.address: 金鐘 Admiralty, 香港島 Hong Kong Island, 香港 Hong Kong, 中国
places.note: Tranquil urban park in the middle of Central with an aviary and conservatory

places.name: Tian Tan Buddha
places.address: 昂平路 Ngong Ping Road, 昂坪 Ngong Ping, 香港 Hong Kong, 昂坪村 Ngong Ping Village
places.note: Giant outdoor bronze Buddha statue on Lantau Island, 34 metres tall

places.name: Po Lin Monastery
places.address: 昂平路 Ngong Ping Road, 離島區 Islands District, 香港 Hong Kong, 中国
places.note: Active Buddhist monastery adjacent to the Tian Tan Buddha, ornate and atmospheric

places.name: Lan Kwai Fong
places.address: 榮華里 Wing Wah Lane, 中環 Central, 香港島 Hong Kong Island, 香港 Hong Kong
places.note: Central district nightlife hub, home to several of Asia's top-ranked cocktail bars

places.name: PMQ
places.address: 鴨巴甸街 Aberdeen Street, 上環 Sheung Wan, 香港島 Hong Kong Island, 香港 Hong Kong
places.note: Former Police Married Quarters in Central, now a creative hub with local designer studios and pop-ups

places.name: Cheung Chau Island
places.address: 離島區 Islands District, 香港 Hong Kong, 中国
places.note: Car-free outlying island with a fishing village, beaches, and a pirate cave

places.name: Lamma Island
places.address: 香港 Hong Kong, 中国
places.note: Laid-back outlying island with seafood restaurants, short hikes, and no high-rises
